---
title: "Download SRA Metabarcoding Data"
format: html

params:
  bioprojects: 
    - "PRJNA1458311"
  n_max: 200
---

## Load packages

```{r}
#| label: packages
library(rentrez)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(here)
```

```{r}
manifest_dir <- here("metabarcoding_data_wrangling", "manifests")
out_dir      <- here("metabarcoding_data_wrangling", "data", "raw")
```

```{r}
get_sra_runs <- function(prjna, n_max = 200) {
  
  message("Querying: ", prjna)
  
  search <- entrez_search(
    db = "sra",
    term = prjna,
    retmax = n_max
  )
  
  summaries <- entrez_summary(db = "sra", id = search$ids)
  
  runs <- summaries |>
    map(~ .x$runs) |>
    unlist() |>
    str_extract_all("SRR\\d+") |>
    unlist() |>
    unique()
  
  tibble(
    bioproject = prjna,
    run = runs
  )
}
```

```{r}
run_table <- purrr::map_dfr(
  params$bioprojects,
  ~ get_sra_runs(.x, params$n_max)
) %>%
  distinct()
```

### Inspect table
```{r}
run_table %>%
  count(bioproject)
```

```{r}
manifest_dir <- here("metabarcoding_data_wrangling", "manifests")
dir.create(manifest_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

run_table %>%
  group_by(bioproject) %>%
  group_walk(~ {
    
    file <- file.path(manifest_dir, paste0(.y$bioproject, ".txt"))
    
    writeLines(.x$run, file)
  })
```

```{r}
writeLines(
  run_table$run,
  here("metabarcoding_data_wrangling", "manifests", "ALL_SRRs.txt")
)
```

```{r}
# Download SRA runs

out_dir <- here::here("metabarcoding_data_wrangling", "data", "raw")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

run_table %>%
  dplyr::pull(run) %>%
  unique() %>%
  purrr::walk(~ {

    message("Downloading: ", .x)

    system(
      paste(
        "fasterq-dump", .x,
        "--split-files",
        "-O", out_dir
      )
    )
  })
```

# End
